## Template

- Name:
- Version:
- Author:
- Public repository:
- Pinned release or commit:
- Live preview:
- Ceramic package compatibility:
- Tested themes:

## Contributor declaration

- [ ] `npx utopia-ds template validate .` passes.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this source and every included asset.
- [ ] Demo claims and data are clearly identified and are not presented as production facts.
- [ ] The template supports responsive layout, dark mode, keyboard use, and RTL.
- [ ] The repository contains no credentials, `.env` files, private keys, or install lifecycle scripts.

## Notes for reviewers

Describe intentional raw media colors, external dependencies, known limitations, or anything else reviewers should understand.
